infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: InverteQuest uses your camera to photograph freshwater invertebrates for identification.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: InverteQuest tags your specimens with GPS coordinates so they can be linked to stream sites.
